name: cap-garuda-plugin
description: Pre-Dev documentation and Dev execution pipelines for garuda-ui — Capillary Loyalty Frontend. Includes guardrails, session journaling, and persistent memory for resume-safe pipelines.
author: Capillary Frontend Team

features.guardrails: Exit checklists on all 12 agents + gate checks on all 5 commands
features.session_journal: Auto-written after each phase for resume across sessions
features.shared_rules: skills/shared-rules.md — single source for coding patterns
